backend/main.mo: Entry point for the Motoko backend actor that composes in blob storage functionality via a mixin pattern.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented game features (OVO platformer mechanics, levels, portals, exits, rendering) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark arcade themes including colors, borders, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title 'Arcade Hub — Play Classic Games', Google Fonts preconnect hints, and a root div that mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with 15 game routes (lobby, snake, tic-tac-toe, memory match, stickman archers, OVO, Mario, Pokémon, slope, 1v1.lol, Minecraft, Retro Bowl, Among Us, FNAF, Rocket Soccer) all nested under a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Site-wide layout component providing a sticky retro arcade header with desktop and mobile-responsive navigation for all 15 game routes, a main content slot, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Reusable leaderboard component that reads up to 5 top scores from localStorage via useLocalLeaderboard and renders ranked entries with neon accent styling supporting both higher-is-better and lower-is-better modes.
Score submission form that accepts an uppercase nickname (max 10 chars), persists the score to localStorage via useLocalLeaderboard, and shows a confirmation state after saving.
frontend/src/hooks/use1v1LolGame.ts: Implements a 1v1 platformer shooting game hook with player/AI characters, projectiles, wall placement, collision resolution, and game state management using refs for performance.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Provides a React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmongUsGame.ts: Implements an Among Us-inspired mini-game hook where the player completes tasks while avoiding an impostor, managing movement, task interaction, and win/lose conditions.
frontend/src/hooks/useFnafGame.ts: Implements a Five Nights at Freddy's-style survival game hook with animatronic movement along camera paths, door/power management, and night timer logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functionality and identity state with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Provides a local leaderboard hook that persists and retrieves top-10 scores per game in localStorage, supporting both ascending and descending sort order.
frontend/src/hooks/useMinecraftClassic3D: Implements a 3D Minecraft-style game hook using Three.js with block types, procedural terrain generation, mobs, arrows, inventory, and crafting recipes.
frontend/src/hooks/useOvoGame.ts: Defines types, level data, and game state for a multi-level 2D platformer game with moving platforms, hazards, portals, and an exit. Exports the full GameState and Level structures used to drive the game loop.
frontend/src/hooks/usePokemonGame.ts: Implements a Pokémon-style turn-based battle game hook with a roster of six typed Pokémon, move/damage calculations, and battle phase management. Exports state and callbacks for selecting fighters, executing moves, and tracking battle logs.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module reserved for future backend query hooks; currently exports nothing as leaderboard data is handled via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetroBowlGame.ts: Provides game state and logic for a retro American football game, including play selection (run/pass), aiming, ball throwing, receiver/defender simulation, and drive/down tracking. Uses a ref-based mutable state updated each frame.
frontend/src/hooks/useRocketSoccerLeague: Implements a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game hook with physics for a player car, AI car, and ball on a scaled field, including boost mechanics, goal detection, and a match timer. Exposes both a ref-based physics state and React UI state.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlopeGame.ts: Manages state and update logic for an endless downhill ball-rolling game with procedurally generated box and gap obstacles, steering input, speed acceleration, and collision/game-over detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useStickmanArchersGam: React hook managing a stickman archers game with single/two-player modes, handling game state, arrow physics, AI shooting, aim adjustment, and collision detection via a game loop.
frontend/src/hooks/useSuperMarioGame.ts: React hook managing a Super Mario-style platformer game state including level layout (platforms, enemies, coins), player physics, camera scrolling, and keyboard input handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a retro arcade dark theme with neon color tokens, Tailwind base/components/utilities, and custom neon button and arcade control styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AmongUsGame.tsx: React page component rendering an Among Us-inspired canvas game with room/task/impostor drawing, keyboard controls, score submission, and a leaderboard display.
frontend/src/pages/FnafGame.tsx: React page component rendering a Five Nights at Freddy's-inspired canvas game with office/camera views, door controls, power management, animatronic tracking, and score submission.
frontend/src/pages/FootballBrosGame.tsx: React page component for a Football Bros canvas game (content truncated, likely includes game rendering, controls, and score submission similar to other game pages).
frontend/src/pages/GameLobby.tsx: Renders the main game lobby page displaying a grid of available games (Snake, Tic-Tac-Toe, Memory Match, etc.) with styled cards and navigation links, alongside a Leaderboard component.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: Implements the Memory Match card-flipping game with shuffle logic, move tracking, match detection, and a completion screen that integrates ScoreSubmission and Leaderboard components.
Renders a 3D voxel-based Minecraft-style game using React Three Fiber with instanced block meshes, player/mob rendering, and a hotbar UI driven by the useMinecraftClassic3DGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/OneLolGame.tsx: Implements a 1v1 shooting/building game rendered on an HTML canvas with a player vs. AI loop, HP bars, projectiles, and score submission via the use1v1LolGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/OvoGame.tsx: Renders the OvO precision platformer game on an HTML canvas, managing game phases (idle, playing, dead, complete), level display, mobile controls, and time-based score submission with a leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/PokemonGame.tsx: Renders a turn-based Pokémon battle game page with roster selection, battle arena with HP bars, battle log, and post-game score submission and leaderboard display using the usePokemonGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/RetroBowlGame.tsx: Renders a retro-style American football game on an HTML canvas, drawing the field, players, ball, and UI overlays, with play selection controls and post-game score submission via useRetroBowlGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/RocketSoccerLeagueGam: Renders a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game using React Three Fiber, featuring a chase camera, player/AI cars, ball physics visualization, boost effects, and score submission with leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/SlopeGame.tsx: Renders a 3D endless-runner slope game using React Three Fiber with a rolling ball, procedural lane tiles, obstacles, and neon visuals, driven by the useSlopeGame hook with score submission on game over.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: Implements a classic Snake game on an HTML canvas with neon visuals, keyboard controls, collision detection, and post-game score submission and leaderboard components.
frontend/src/pages/StickmanArchersGame.t: React page component for a Stickman Archers game that renders gameplay on an HTML canvas, including drawing helpers for the ground, stickman characters with bows, and game UI with mode selection and controls.
frontend/src/pages/SuperMarioGame.tsx: React page component for a Super Mario-style platformer that renders the game on a canvas with platforms, coins, enemies, a player character, and a HUD, plus score submission and leaderboard integration.
frontend/src/pages/TicTacToeGame.tsx: React page component implementing a two-player Tic-Tac-Toe game with win/draw detection, neon-styled cell highlighting, and a restart button.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom arcade/neon color tokens, pixel and sans font families, neon box-shadow utilities, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the OVO 2D platformer, tracking schema version, existing implemented features (physics, levels, portals, level exit, rendering), and pending new feature requests.
